content:
# Flow 后端专属节点（仅 Node.js 执行）

## 描述

后端专属节点只能出现在后端 FlowSchema 中（云函数实现体）。它们操作数据库、发起 HTTP 请求、执行表达式与脚本。前端 FlowSchema 不能使用这些节点，前端要操作数据必须通过 callFlow 调用包含这些节点的云函数。

## dbQuery（数据库查询）

```json
{
  "id": "q-users",
  "kind": "dbQuery",
  "collection": "users",
  "filter": { "status": { "kind": "literal", "value": "active" } },
  "projection": { "password": 0 },
  "sort": { "createdAt": -1 },
  "limit": 20,
  "outputVariable": "userList"
}
```
- **collection** (string) [必填] — 集合名（对应 CollectionDefinition.name）
- **filter** (Record<string, FlowValue>) [必填] — 查询条件，字段名 → 值
- **projection** (Record<string, 1|0>) [可选] — 字段投影，1=包含，0=排除
- **sort** (Record<string, 1|-1>) [可选] — 排序，1=升序，-1=降序
- **limit** (number) [可选] — 返回条数上限
- **outputVariable** (string) [必填] — 查询结果数组写入哪个变量

## dbInsert（数据库插入）

```json
{
  "id": "ins-order",
  "kind": "dbInsert",
  "collection": "orders",
  "document": {
    "userId": { "kind": "dataRef", "viewId": "local", "key": "uid" },
    "amount": { "kind": "literal", "value": 100 }
  },
  "outputVariable": "newOrderId"
}
```
- **collection** (string) [必填] — 集合名
- **document** (Record<string, FlowValue>) [必填] — 要插入的文档，字段名 → 值
- **outputVariable** (string) [必填] — insertedId 写入哪个变量

## dbUpdate（数据库更新）

```json
{
  "id": "upd-status",
  "kind": "dbUpdate",
  "collection": "orders",
  "filter": { "_id": { "kind": "dataRef", "viewId": "local", "key": "orderId" } },
  "update": { "status": { "kind": "literal", "value": "paid" } },
  "outputVariable": "modifiedCount"
}
```
- **filter** (Record<string, FlowValue>) [必填] — 匹配条件
- **update** (Record<string, FlowValue>) [必填] — 更新字段
- **outputVariable** (string) [必填] — modifiedCount 写入哪个变量

## dbDelete（数据库删除）

```json
{
  "id": "del-item",
  "kind": "dbDelete",
  "collection": "cartItems",
  "filter": { "_id": { "kind": "eventArg", "index": 0 } },
  "outputVariable": "deletedCount"
}
```
- **filter** (Record<string, FlowValue>) [必填] — 匹配条件
- **outputVariable** (string) [必填] — deletedCount 写入哪个变量

## httpRequest（HTTP 请求）

```json
{
  "id": "http-1",
  "kind": "httpRequest",
  "url": { "kind": "literal", "value": "https://api.example.com/data" },
  "method": "POST",
  "headers": { "Content-Type": { "kind": "literal", "value": "application/json" } },
  "body": { "kind": "dataRef", "viewId": "local", "key": "payload" },
  "outputVariable": "response"
}
```
- **url** (FlowValue) [必填] — 请求地址
- **method** ("GET"|"POST"|"PUT"|"DELETE"|"PATCH") [必填] — 请求方法
- **headers** (Record<string, FlowValue>) [可选] — 请求头
- **body** (FlowValue) [可选] — 请求体
- **outputVariable** (string) [必填] — response 写入哪个变量

## transform（安全表达式转换）

```json
{
  "id": "calc",
  "kind": "transform",
  "expression": "price * quantity",
  "variables": {
    "price": { "kind": "dataRef", "viewId": "local", "key": "price" },
    "quantity": { "kind": "dataRef", "viewId": "local", "key": "qty" }
  },
  "outputVariable": "total"
}
```
- **expression** (string) [必填] — 安全表达式（expr-eval 语法，不支持任意 JS）
- **variables** (Record<string, FlowValue>) [必填] — 表达式中可引用的变量
- **outputVariable** (string) [必填] — 计算结果写入哪个变量

## script（自定义脚本，vm 沙箱）

```json
{
  "id": "s1",
  "kind": "script",
  "code": "return { sum: input.a + input.b }",
  "inputBindings": { "a": { "kind": "literal", "value": 1 } },
  "outputBindings": { "sum": "result" },
  "timeout": 5000
}
```
- **code** (string) [必填] — 脚本代码（vm 沙箱执行）
- **inputBindings** (Record<string, FlowValue>) [必填] — 注入脚本的输入
- **outputBindings** (Record<string, string>) [必填] — 脚本返回对象 key → 写入哪个变量
- **timeout** (number) [可选] — 超时毫秒，默认 5000

## 选型优先级

优先用结构化节点（dbQuery/dbInsert/transform）而非 script。script 仅在前述节点无法表达时使用。能用 transform 表达的计算不要用 script。
